# BP-116 negative: Echo writes the error response and returns nil.
lang: go
file: BP-116-safe.go
variant: echo
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/labstack/echo/v4"
)

func create(c echo.Context) error {
	if err := save(); err != nil {
		if responseErr := c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, map[string]string{"error": err.Error()}); responseErr != nil {
			return responseErr
		}
		return nil
	}
	return c.JSON(http.StatusCreated, map[string]bool{"ok": true})
}

func save() error { return nil }
